title: Redesign Onboarding Flow to 5 Steps
user_story: As a new user, I want to complete initial setup quickly in 5 steps or fewer, so that I can start using the product without frustration or abandonment.

acceptance_criteria.description: Onboarding wizard has a maximum of 5 essential steps
Integration setup is moved to an optional wizard accessible from the dashboard
Users can complete onboarding without needing API keys or external credentials
Session does not expire during the onboarding flow within a 30-minute window
Onboarding completion rate is tracked and reported in analytics

title: Build Notification Preferences Center
user_story: As a user, I want to control which notifications I receive and through which channels, so that I am not overwhelmed with irrelevant alerts.

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can select notification channel (email, in-app, push, or none) per event type
Users can configure quiet hours during which non-critical notifications are suppressed
Non-urgent notifications can be batched into a configurable daily digest
Critical alerts bypass quiet hours and digest settings

title: Implement Bulk Actions for Task List
user_story: As an enterprise user with many tasks, I want to select multiple items and perform actions in bulk, so that I can manage large task lists efficiently.

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can select multiple tasks using checkboxes or shift-click
Bulk actions include archive, delete, add tag, remove tag, reassign, and change status
Keyboard shortcuts are available for common bulk operations
Confirmation dialog shows the number of affected items before destructive actions
Bulk operations complete within 5 seconds for up to 100 selected items

title: Fix Dark Mode Consistency Across All Pages
user_story: As a user who prefers dark mode, I want consistent dark theme rendering across all pages, so that I can work comfortably without encountering unreadable text or jarring white backgrounds.

acceptance_criteria.description: All color values are migrated from hardcoded values to CSS custom properties
Dark mode renders correctly on all pages without white backgrounds or unreadable text
Legacy components are audited and updated to use the shared color variable system
Visual regression tests cover dark mode for all major page templates

title: Add Multi-Format Data Export
user_story: As a user, I want to export my data in CSV, PDF, and JSON formats, so that I can share reports with stakeholders and integrate with other tools.

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can export data in CSV format for spreadsheet use
Users can export data in PDF format suitable for stakeholder presentations
Users can export data in JSON format for programmatic integrations
Export format selection is available from a single export button with dropdown
